raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 935 will close an enforcement loophole in the flavored tobacco ban upheld by 63 percent of voters in 2022.",
    "AB 935 will authorize the California Department of Health and the Attorney General to enforce the flavored tobacco ban.",
    "There is confusion among retailers regarding which tobacco products are prohibited under the existing law.",
    "Flavored tobacco products continue to be sold in many stores across California.",
    "The existing loophole allows teenagers to access flavored tobacco products.",
    "Preventing the next generation from becoming addicted to smoking is a priority for public health.",
    "A recent survey found that over 57 percent of respondents nationwide support a policy to prohibit the sale of all tobacco products.",
    "Strengthening the enforcement clause of SB 793 will save lives."
  ]
}
```
